response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies; while he has some C++ exposure from NI LabWindows, it's not sustained or leadership-scale, and there's no evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or mentoring in cloud/DevOps engineering as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Demonstrated ability to own ambiguous projects (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering roles
